title: Clean Code Principles
description: Learn naming conventions, functions constraints, code formatting, and code readability standards.
learningObjectives: Differentiate clean code from complex code structures
Apply clear naming conventions for classes, variables, and methods
Design small, single-purpose functions with minimal arguments

sections.title: Readability and Naming Conventions
sections.content: Clean code is code that is easy to read, test, and maintain. Code is read far more often than it is written. In AAA game development, where teams consist of hundreds of engineers, adhering to consistent styling guidelines (like PascalCase for variables and methods in Unreal) prevents misunderstandings. Functions should do one thing, do it well, and have no side effects.

sections.title: Refactoring to Clean Functions
